task_summaries.task_scope: Quantify dependency concentration and linear correlation strength for each identified strong dependency feature pair using bounded pairwise relation measures.
Examine protocol and flow-level semantics relevant to the strong dependency feature pairs to contextualize dependency origins and structural causes.
Explore potential data processing or feature engineering steps contributing to redundancy patterns among the strong dependency pairs using structural summaries and distribution verifications.
Evaluate how strong dependencies influence feature selection stability and model sensitivity by verifying local consistency and shortcut-like predictive signals for involved features.
